CustomField.description: Auto checked if the "Over Income - Income Level, May Qualify for Other Income Levels" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto checked if the "Over Income - Income Level, May Qualify for Other Income Levels" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.label: IRC_Over Income Income Level
